# PlayerSelector

A fast, touch-based player picker for casual group games. Press your fingers on the screen simultaneously to pick and assign players to teams.

## Features

- **Multi-touch player picking** — press multiple fingers at once to register players
- **Team assignment** — automatically distribute players across teams
- **Visual feedback** — color-coded circles show player selection and loading progress
- **Multiple picking modes**:
    - **Single mode** — pick individual players
    - **Team mode** — divide all players equally into teams

## Installation

### From GitHub Releases
Download the latest APK from [Releases](https://github.com/Elnix90/PlayerSelector/releases) and install it on your Android device.

### Build from Source
```bash
git clone https://github.com/Elnix90/PlayerSelector.git
cd PlayerSelector
./gradlew assembleStableRelease
```
